heading: Liability to contemporaneous traders for insider trading
label: 78t–1 Liability to contemporaneous traders for insider trading
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsecs. (a), (c), (d), and (e), was in the original “this title”. See References in Text note set out under .section 78a of this title
Effective DateSection not applicable to actions occurring before , see set out as an Effective Date of 1988 Amendment note under section 78 of this title.Nov. 19, 1988section 9 of Pub. L. 100–704o
amendments: Effective DateSection not applicable to actions occurring before , see set out as an Effective Date of 1988 Amendment note under section 78 of this title.Nov. 19, 1988section 9 of Pub. L. 100–704o

children.heading: Private rights of action based on contemporaneous trading
children.label: a Private rights of action based on contemporaneous trading
children.text: Any person who violates any provision of this chapter or the rules or regulations thereunder by purchasing or selling a security while in possession of material, nonpublic information shall be liable in an action in any court of competent jurisdiction to any person who, contemporaneously with the purchase or sale of securities that is the subject of such violation, has purchased (where such violation is based on a sale of securities) or sold (where such violation is based on a purchase of securities) securities of the same class.

children.heading: Contemporaneous trading actions limited to profit gained or loss avoided
children.label: 1 Contemporaneous trading actions limited to profit gained or loss avoided
children.text: The total amount of damages imposed under subsection (a) shall not exceed the profit gained or loss avoided in the transaction or transactions that are the subject of the violation.

children.heading: Offsetting disgorgements against liability
children.label: 2 Offsetting disgorgements against liability
children.text: The total amount of damages imposed against any person under subsection (a) shall be diminished by the amounts, if any, that such person may be required to disgorge, pursuant to a court order obtained at the instance of the Commission, in a proceeding brought under relating to the same transaction or transactions.section 78u(d) of this title

children.heading: Controlling person liability
children.label: 3 Controlling person liability
children.text: No person shall be liable under this section solely by reason of employing another person who is liable under this section, but the liability of a controlling person under this section shall be subject to .section 78t(a) of this title

children.heading: Statute of limitations
children.label: 4 Statute of limitations
children.text: No action may be brought under this section more than 5 years after the date of the last transaction that is the subject of the violation.

children.heading: Joint and several liability for communicating
children.label: c Joint and several liability for communicating
children.text: Any person who violates any provision of this chapter or the rules or regulations thereunder by communicating material, nonpublic information shall be jointly and severally liable under subsection (a) with, and to the same extent as, any person or persons liable under subsection (a) to whom the communication was directed.

children.heading: Authority not to restrict other express or implied rights of action
children.label: d Authority not to restrict other express or implied rights of action
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to limit or condition the right of any person to bring an action to enforce a requirement of this chapter or the availability of any cause of action implied from a provision of this chapter.

children.heading: Provisions not to affect public prosecutions
children.label: e Provisions not to affect public prosecutions
children.text: This section shall not be construed to bar or limit in any manner any action by the Commission or the Attorney General under any other provision of this chapter, nor shall it bar or limit in any manner any action to recover penalties, or to seek any other order regarding penalties.
